network_summary: Oscar Geovanni Gonzalez DDS MBA is registered as Authorized Official / Director of Operations on four NPI organization records spanning 4 Chicagoland watched-IL ZIPs. The network splits into two apparent sub-groups sharing the same AO: (1) 'All Perfect Smiles' PCs in Elmhurst (60126) and Beverly/Chicago (60643), operating as 'Perfect Smiles' consumer brand — Dr. Lena Halikias appears as president per BBB; Gonzalez holds the Director of Operations administrative/credentialing title; (2) 'Prairie Dental' LLCs in Oak Park (60301) and Lisle (60532), which currently operate under the consumer brand 'Prairie Walk Dental' and are confirmed affiliated with Smile Partners USA — a PE-backed DSO (Silver Oak Services Partners since 2017, recapitalized via BlackRock/Hollyport continuation fund 2025) with 120 offices including Chicago metro. Prairie Walk Dental of Lisle books via NexHealth URL slug 'smile_partners_usa', which is documentary evidence of MSO affiliation. Oscar Gonzalez's 'Director of Operations' title (not owner/founder) across all four NPIs suggests a centralized management or credentialing-officer role, possibly under the Smile Partners USA administrative platform or a shared management entity spanning both sub-groups.
owner_operator_identity: Oscar Geovanni Gonzalez DDS MBA — registered Authorized Official / Director of Operations on all four NPIs. Dr. Lena Halikias identified as President/owner of the All Perfect Smiles group per BBB. Dr. Chris Thomas identified as operating dentist at Prairie Walk Dental of Oak Park. Prairie Walk Dental of Lisle led by Dr. Michael Gonda and Dr. Tooba Ajmal per web sources.

mso_platform_pe_evidence: Smile Partners USA — a PE-backed DSO/MSO headquartered in Troy, MI, operating 120 offices across Chicago metro (among other markets). PE backers: Silver Oak Services Partners (Evanston, IL; invested since 2017) + BlackRock Secondaries & Liquidity Solutions + Hollyport Capital (recapitalization via continuation fund, announced February 2025). Documentary source: https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/smile-partners-announces-recapitalization-through-new-continuation-fund-led-by-commitments-from-funds-managed-by-blackrock-and-hollyport-capital-302365872.html and https://pe-insights.com/blackrock-and-hollyport-back-silver-oaks-recapitalization-of-smile-partners/. The Prairie Dental / Prairie Walk Dental locations (Oak Park + Lisle) in this cluster are affiliated with Smile Partners USA based on the NexHealth booking URL slug 'smile_partners_usa'. NOTE: Documentary PE/MSO evidence applies specifically to the Prairie Walk Dental (Oak Park + Lisle) sub-group; no MSO/PE evidence was found for the All Perfect Smiles (Elmhurst + Beverly) sub-group independently.
stale_closed_false_positive_notes: The AO cluster under OSCAR GONZALEZ spans two apparent business families: (1) All Perfect Smiles PCs (Elmhurst + Beverly), where Gonzalez is an operations director, not necessarily the owner-dentist, and (2) Prairie Dental LLCs (Oak Park + Lisle), which now trade as Prairie Walk Dental and have confirmed Smile Partners USA MSO affiliation. Oscar Gonzalez's 'Director of Operations' title is characteristic of an administrative/credentialing officer at a DSO-affiliated practice, NOT a solo dentist-owner. The ogsmiles.com / citylifestyle.com results for 'Oscar Gonzalez DDS' are a DIFFERENT person (West Hartford, CT) — not the Illinois AO. The All Perfect Smiles of Beverly website now mentions Dr. Stephen Morris as the lead dentist who moved to the Beverly location; Gonzalez does not appear on the public team roster, consistent with his being a back-office operations contact.
evidence_chain: AO signal: NPPES lists Oscar Geovanni Gonzalez DDS MBA as Authorized Official / Director of Operations on 4 organization NPIs across Elmhurst (60126), Oak Park (60301), Lisle (60532), and Chicago Beverly (60643). Documentary corroboration (Prairie Walk sub-group): Prairie Walk Dental of Lisle books appointments via NexHealth URL slug 'smile_partners_usa' (https://app.nexhealth.com/appt/smile_partners_usa?lid=72007); the practice address (4751 Main St, Lisle 60532) matches the NPPES address (4746 Main St, same building) for Prairie Dental Partners LLC; Smile Partners USA is documented as a PE-backed DSO (Silver Oak / BlackRock / Hollyport) with Chicago metro coverage confirmed in press releases. Prairie Walk Dental of Oak Park at 1010 Lake St, Oak Park 60301 is documented operating at the same address as NPPES-registered Prairie Dental of Oak Park LLC. Partial corroboration (All Perfect Smiles sub-group): BBB profile for All Perfect Smiles of Elmhurst lists two locations (Elmhurst + Palos Park) under Dr. Lena Halikias as President; allperfectsmiles.com serves as the group's consumer website but only shows the Beverly location publicly. No independent MSO/PE documentary evidence found for the All Perfect Smiles sub-group — no management company URL, no PE filing, no DSO locator match.
future_app_notes: 1. Confirm whether the All Perfect Smiles PCs (Elmhurst + Beverly) are also managed under Smile Partners USA or a separate management entity — check the NexHealth booking URL for allperfectsmiles.com/Perfect Smiles of Beverly for a 'smile_partners_usa' slug. 2. The 5th All Perfect Smiles location (Frankfort, NPI 1386146074) is outside the watched-IL ZIPs but shares the same AO — track for future expansion of the watched ZIP set. 3. Dr. Lena Halikias (BBB-listed President, All Perfect Smiles / Perfect Smiles Dentistry) is likely the owner-dentist of the All Perfect Smiles sub-group; a separate AO investigation for her may yield direct ownership evidence. 4. The Prairie Walk Dental (Lisle + Oak Park) entries in practice_locations may need entity_classification updated to dso_regional or dso_national if confirmed under Smile Partners USA corporate umbrella. 5. Oscar Gonzalez's exact role in the ownership hierarchy (sole owner, co-owner, purely administrative) remains unconfirmed from public sources — his 'Director of Operations' title on NPPES is consistent with an MSO back-office admin rather than a practicing dentist-owner.
